'''Dulorr''' was a [[Prince/Legends|princess]] of the Royal Family of Eiattu, daughter of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Uthorrferrell Cartha]] and elder sister of [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo]]. She was murdered by rebellious Eiattuan nobles together with the rest of the royal family.
